subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh is verily the Hidden Mystery and the Treasured Secret [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لهو الغیب المکنون و الکنز المخزون
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
